title: Quick Start Guide - Osprey/Tern - First screen, single earbud/pairing - zoom in/out
scenario: Verify zoom in/out behavior of single earbud pairing screen in Quick Start Guide
steps: Go to Device Settings > Quick Start Guide.
Verify the earbud zooms in with text matching the Figma Pairing screen.
Click the blue circle button again.
Verify the screen zooms out to the original view.
expected: On first click, the earbud zooms in with text matching the Figma Pairing screen. On second click, the screen zooms out to the original view.
